footer.tagline: Upload past exams. See how your professor asks. Study where it counts.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} ProfAI · Built by students, for students.

hero.subtitle: Upload a past exam. We break down question types, topics, and difficulty — so you study what actually shows up.

home.empty: No professors yet — upload an exam to add the first one.

howItWorks.title: How ProfAI works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps, from a PDF to a study plan.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop a PDF, JPG, or PNG of any exam your professor has given.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We break down question types, topics, and difficulty — with the numbers.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Spot patterns across semesters and focus where questions actually repeat.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.

register.title: Join ProfAI
register.subtitle: Free for students. Email is all we need.
register.name: Full name

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.

detail.perExamHint: {{count}} exams analyzed — question counts, types, and topic breakdowns.
detail.fallbackAggregateHint: Aggregated summary from the analyses we have
detail.contributeExam: Add an exam for this professor

style.title: Professor's Style
style.subtitle: Based on {{count}} analyzed exams
style.staleNote: A new exam just landed — the summary updates in a moment.
style.insufficientBody: We need {{min}} verified exam analyses to build a style profile — we have {{count}} so far. Add a couple more exams and it generates itself.

professors.empty: No professors match these filters — try loosening one.

detail.noRatingsYet: No ratings yet — be the first.

upload.title: Upload an exam
upload.subtitle: Share a past exam. Get the breakdown in seconds — your classmates see it too.
upload.fileHint: PDF, JPG, or PNG · up to 10 MB
upload.drag: Drop a file here, or click to browse

studyPack.headerSubtitle: {{count}} topic summaries, {{questionCount}} practice questions, {{patternCount}} professor patterns
studyPack.disclaimer: This content was generated by AI. Verify the definitions that matter against your course material.
studyPack.toleranceWarning: The question-type mix drifted from your professor's usual split — still useful, but cross-check against your notes.

summary.empty: No topic summaries in this pack.

practice.empty: No practice questions in this pack.

trick.empty: No professor-specific patterns yet — more exams sharpen the picture.
trick.subtitle: Short reminders extracted from past exam patterns

notFound.title: Pack not found
notFound.body: It may have been deleted or belongs to another account.

uploadNotes.title: Turn your notes into practice the way your prof asks
uploadNotes.subtitle: Upload your notes. We turn them into summaries, practice questions, and reminders on how this prof actually asks.
uploadNotes.selectCourseHint: The professor is picked up from the course automatically.
uploadNotes.fileHint: PDF, DOCX, or TXT · up to 10 MB each · multiple allowed
uploadNotes.fileRejection: Only PDF, DOCX, or TXT is accepted.
uploadNotes.generateEta: Gemini takes about 20-30 seconds — please keep this tab open.
uploadNotes.noFiles: Add at least one note file.
uploadNotes.insufficientStyle: This professor doesn't have a style profile yet. Add a few past exams first.
uploadNotes.insufficientNotes: The selected notes were not found.
uploadNotes.shortWarning: {{title}} is short — about {{count}} words. 500+ words gives a better pack, but you can still try.
uploadNotes.privacyNote: Your notes stay private to your account.
uploadNotes.copyrightNote: Don't upload copyrighted material — publisher textbooks or someone else's notes. Only add what you've written yourself.
uploadNotes.existingNotesHint: Pick from previously uploaded notes to build a pack quickly.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what you've uploaded and rated.
dashboard.empty: No uploads yet — add your first exam to get started.

rating.title: Rate this professor
rating.loginRequired: Sign in to rate this professor.

common.error: Something went wrong — try again in a moment.

generate.title: Take a mock exam in your professor's style
generate.subtitle: Pick a course, optionally link a study pack, and we'll build a timed practice exam that matches how they usually ask.
generate.selectCourseHint: The professor is picked up from the course automatically.
generate.packOptionNone: None — use the professor's style only
generate.noPacks: No study pack saved for this professor yet — we'll build the exam from their style alone.
generate.disclaimer: AI-generated practice, not a real exam. Treat it as a warm-up.
generate.generatingEta: Usually 30-60 seconds — we're shaping each question in your professor's style.

errors.styleMissing: Not enough analyzed exams for this professor yet. Add one and try again.
errors.packNotFound: We couldn't find that study pack.
errors.notesNotFound: We couldn't find the notes linked to that pack.

notFound.title: Mock exam not found
notFound.body: It may have been deleted, or it belongs to another account.

session.submitError: Submission failed: {{message}}. Your answers are safe locally — try again in a moment.
session.exitWarning: You haven't submitted yet. Your answers are saved locally, but you'll need to submit to see your score.
session.autoSubmitting: Time's up — submitting your answers now…

classic.placeholder: Write your answer here. Keep it concise, but show your reasoning.

confirm.title: Submit your mock exam?
confirm.body: {{unanswered}} still blank, {{flagged}} flagged. Once you submit, we grade and save your answers.

result.disclaimer: Grading is AI-assisted — open-ended answers are scored against a rubric, not by a human. Use the feedback as a starting point, not a final verdict.

topicGap.cta: Review this in your study pack

topicGaps.title: Where to focus next
topicGaps.subtitle: Topics where your accuracy dipped — easy wins for the next session.

sections.empty: No section breakdown was stored for this exam.

notFound.title: Result not found
notFound.body: This session may have been deleted, or it belongs to another account.

panic.title: Exam's close. Let's build a plan together.
panic.subtitle: Tell us the course and how much time you've got. We'll split the window by the topics that matter most right now.

form.hoursHint: Min 30 min, max 72 h. Be realistic — not optimistic.

plan.title: Your plan for the next {{hours}} hours
plan.summary: {{minutes}} focused minutes across {{steps}} topics. The rest is for breaks, food, and sleep — you'll need them.
plan.emptySteps: Not enough topic signal yet. Run one more mock exam and the plan sharpens up.
plan.disclaimer: A suggestion, not a syllabus — adjust as you go.
plan.practiceCta: Warm up with a mock exam

verifiedBadge.label: Verified
verifiedBadge.tooltip: Three students confirmed this exam is genuine.

credit.title: Your credit ledger
credit.subtitle: Earn by uploading exams, voting on questions, and writing reports. Spend on mock exams and study packs.

empty.title: No credits yet
empty.body: Uploading your first exam earns you 10 credits.

approval.title: Approve uploaded exams
approval.subtitle: Review uploads and confirm the ones that look right. Three approvals mark an exam as verified and earn the uploader 10 credits.

empty.title: No exams waiting for review right now
empty.body: New uploads will show up here. Check back in a bit.

approval.reasonHint: If you're rejecting, a short reason helps moderation.
approval.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. the professor name doesn't match this file…
approval.error: Couldn't save your vote. Give it a minute and try again.

vote.promptExam: Vote on this question — push it toward the verified pool.
vote.promptPractice: Did this practice question help? Votes shape the pool.

postExam.title: How did your exam go?
postExam.subtitle: Which topics showed up, which ones were hard? Once ten students report, an anonymous summary appears.
postExam.kvkkNotice: Your report enters the pool anonymously — your name or identity never appears in aggregates. Only topic + frequency + difficulty statistics are processed.
postExam.error: Something went wrong while sending. Give it a minute and try again.

editor.empty: Add a topic to get started.

insights.title: Recent post-exam reports
insights.subtitle: Anonymous summary from student reports.
insights.insufficient: Need {{threshold}} reports; we have {{count}}/{{threshold}}. Add yours to unlock the aggregate.

studyGroup.title: Your groups
studyGroup.subtitle: You're auto-matched with students preparing for the same professor. Once a group forms, anyone can attach a WhatsApp or Discord link.

empty.title: No groups yet
empty.body: Tap the matcher banner on a professor's page to join.

banner.title: {{count}} students waiting for this professor
banner.subtitle: Join to be auto-matched. Once 5+ people have joined, the group becomes active.

linkModal.title: WhatsApp / Discord link
linkModal.subtitle: Other members will see it and can join.
linkModal.piiWarning: Think twice before you publish this — it becomes a public invite. Only WhatsApp and Discord invite URLs are accepted.

errors.notAllowed: Only WhatsApp or Discord invite links are allowed.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Give it a minute and try again.

highPerformer.title: High-scorers' focus
highPerformer.subtitle: What topics are trending in reports from students who scored 85+.
highPerformer.insufficient: We need {{threshold}} high-scorer reports; we have {{count}}/{{threshold}}. Share your grade after your exam to unlock this insight.
highPerformer.noDominantTopics: No dominant topic yet — reports spread across the syllabus.
highPerformer.disclaimer: Aggregated anonymously from at least five students. It's a trend, not a guarantee.
